ens-manage.title: ENS Domain Batch Query Tool
ens-manage.desc: Lightweight ENS domain batch query tool that supports inputting multiple ENS domain names, one-click query of domain holding addresses, reverse resolution information and expiration time. Query results can be exported as CSV files, which is efficient and convenient.

searchForm.title: ENS Domain Batch Query Tool
searchForm.description: Lightweight ENS domain batch query tool that supports inputting multiple ENS domain names, one-click query of domain holding addresses, reverse resolution information and expiration time. Query results can be exported as CSV files, which is efficient and convenient.
